objects.name: Electronics Demo 2026-05

assignments.comment: Global Trade Item Number. Must be a valid EAN-13 (13 digits, correct check digit).

description.value: Global Trade Item Number. Must be a valid EAN-13 (13 digits, correct check digit).

assignments.comment: Official product name in English. Maximum 150 characters. Do not include brand prefix if already in manufacturer field.

description.value: Official product name in English. Maximum 150 characters. Do not include brand prefix if already in manufacturer field.

assignments.comment: Official product name in German. Optional. Maximum 150 characters.

description.value: Official product name in German. Optional. Maximum 150 characters.

assignments.comment: Brand or manufacturer name. Use the brand's official spelling (e.g. 'Apple', not 'apple' or 'APPLE').

description.value: Brand or manufacturer name. Use the brand's official spelling (e.g. 'Apple', not 'apple' or 'APPLE').

assignments.comment: Manufacturer's own model or article number as printed on packaging or spec sheet.

description.value: Manufacturer's own model or article number as printed on packaging or spec sheet.

assignments.comment: Top-level product category. Must match one of the defined values exactly.

description.value: Top-level product category. Must match one of the defined values exactly.

assignments.comment: Secondary classification within the product type. Free text. Examples: 'Business Ultrabook', 'Over-Ear', 'Multisport GPS'.

description.value: Secondary classification within the product type. Free text. Examples: 'Business Ultrabook', 'Over-Ear', 'Multisport GPS'.

assignments.comment: Marketing-ready teaser text suitable for category listings. Maximum 200 characters. Plain text, no HTML.

description.value: Marketing-ready teaser text suitable for category listings. Maximum 200 characters. Plain text, no HTML.

assignments.comment: Full product description including features, technical highlights and use cases. Plain text, no HTML entities.

description.value: Full product description including features, technical highlights and use cases. Plain text, no HTML entities.

assignments.comment: Recommended retail price in EUR. Numeric decimal, period as decimal separator. No currency symbol (e.g. 1299.00).

description.value: Recommended retail price in EUR. Numeric decimal, period as decimal separator. No currency symbol (e.g. 1299.00).

assignments.comment: Net product weight in kilograms excluding packaging. Numeric decimal with period separator (e.g. 1.86).

description.value: Net product weight in kilograms excluding packaging. Numeric decimal with period separator (e.g. 1.86).

assignments.comment: Gross weight including all original packaging in kilograms. Numeric decimal.

description.value: Gross weight including all original packaging in kilograms. Numeric decimal.

assignments.comment: Product length (longest dimension) in centimetres. Numeric decimal (e.g. 34.40).

description.value: Product length (longest dimension) in centimetres. Numeric decimal (e.g. 34.40).

assignments.comment: Product width (second dimension) in centimetres. Numeric decimal (e.g. 23.01).

description.value: Product width (second dimension) in centimetres. Numeric decimal (e.g. 23.01).

assignments.comment: Product height or depth (shortest dimension) in centimetres. Numeric decimal (e.g. 1.80).

description.value: Product height or depth (shortest dimension) in centimetres. Numeric decimal (e.g. 1.80).

assignments.comment: Primary product colour in standardised English. Must match one of the defined values. Use 'Other' if no match.

description.value: Primary product colour in standardised English. Must match one of the defined values. Use 'Other' if no match.

assignments.comment: Screen or display diagonal size in inches. Numeric decimal (e.g. 15.60). Null for non-display products.

description.value: Screen or display diagonal size in inches. Numeric decimal (e.g. 15.60). Null for non-display products.

assignments.comment: Full processor or SoC model designation as published by the manufacturer (e.g. 'Intel Core i7-13700H', 'Apple M3', 'Snapdragon 8 Gen 3').

description.value: Full processor or SoC model designation as published by the manufacturer (e.g. 'Intel Core i7-13700H', 'Apple M3', 'Snapdragon 8 Gen 3').

assignments.comment: RAM or unified memory capacity in gigabytes. Integer (e.g. 16). For unified memory architectures use total unified memory.

description.value: RAM or unified memory capacity in gigabytes. Integer (e.g. 16). For unified memory architectures use total unified memory.

assignments.comment: Primary internal storage capacity in gigabytes. Integer (e.g. 512). Use base storage SKU value.

description.value: Primary internal storage capacity in gigabytes. Integer (e.g. 512). Use base storage SKU value.

assignments.comment: Battery capacity in milliampere-hours. Integer. If only watt-hour figure available, convert at nominal 3.7V (Wh × 1000 / 3.7).

description.value: Battery capacity in milliampere-hours. Integer. If only watt-hour figure available, convert at nominal 3.7V (Wh × 1000 / 3.7).

assignments.comment: Manufacturer-stated typical battery life in hours under standard use conditions. Numeric decimal (e.g. 13.00).

description.value: Manufacturer-stated typical battery life in hours under standard use conditions. Numeric decimal (e.g. 13.00).

assignments.comment: Highest WiFi standard supported. Must match one of the defined values exactly.

description.value: Highest WiFi standard supported. Must match one of the defined values exactly.

assignments.comment: Bluetooth specification version. Must match one of the defined values.

description.value: Bluetooth specification version. Must match one of the defined values.

assignments.comment: Pre-installed or native operating system. Must match one of the defined values. Use 'Other' if none apply.

description.value: Pre-installed or native operating system. Must match one of the defined values. Use 'Other' if none apply.

assignments.comment: Whether the device supports 5G mobile connectivity. Boolean.

description.value: Whether the device supports 5G mobile connectivity. Boolean.

assignments.comment: Whether the device has Near Field Communication (NFC) support. Boolean.

description.value: Whether the device has Near Field Communication (NFC) support. Boolean.

assignments.comment: Current available stock quantity as integer. Zero is valid for out-of-stock items.

description.value: Current available stock quantity as integer. Zero is valid for out-of-stock items.

assignments.comment: Unique identifier of the supplying organisation as registered in the supplier master data system.

description.value: Unique identifier of the supplying organisation as registered in the supplier master data system.
